The '''Underwater Kingdom''' was a place of residence for an [[Unidentified finned amphibious species/Legends|Unidentified amphibious sentient species]]. Notable residents included [[Squik (amphibious sentient species)|Squik]] and [[Orcon/Legends|Orcon]].
